## Excerpt (first 6 000 chars, docx)

# Website – Required Update

1. Pictures on home page to be set as a slideshow
2. Retain the initial ZMC picture showing the building since it has HD quality and should be part of the slide show\.
3. Ensure all text is evenly aligned across the website\.
4. Make downloads more specific instead of redirecting to a general downloads page\. For example, the Appeals form should allow users to click and download the form directly\.
5. Under downloads change __FOIA APPEALS__ to __FOIA FORMS__
6. Fix the __complaints__ pop\-ups so they display clearly after clicking uploads\.
7. Remove the “__Download complaints__” option under the __Complaints section__\.
8. Under Complaints, remove the “__Download complaint form__” option since there is no complaint form\.
9. Add a __search__ option to the website\.
10. Under Appeals remove the download and the submit option at the bottom since they are appearing at the top\.
11. Under commissioners remove powers of the commission and leave functions of the commission\. Put the functions as it is in the constitution or as indicated in the about section\.
12. Change the solid color to have some designs in the backend that are a little bit transparent\.![](data:image/jpeg;base64,
